bio:
Physicist (Dr.rer. nat.) and Machine Learning Engineer with extensive experience in large‑scale data analysis, scientific simulation, and automated workflow design. 
 I build robust ML and MLOps systems, design reproducible pipelines, and work comfortably with high‑dimensional, fast‑moving datasets. My focus is on translating complex analytical workflows into scalable, reliable services that operate in real‑time environments. 
I bridge the gap between research prototypes and production systems, ensuring clarity, maintainability, and operational stability. Driven by analytical rigor and system thinking, I enjoy developing solutions that support data‑driven decision‑making in technically demanding domains.
